risk_if_not_implemented: Without Emergency Changes, unauthorized or unreviewed changes may introduce instability or security vulnerabilities into the environment.

compensating_control_1.name: Risk Assessment
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct recurring assessments of risk that includes the likelihood and magnitude of harm, from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification or destruction of the organization's Technology Assets, Applications, Services and/or Data (TAASD).
compensating_control_1.justification: Risk Assessment (RSK-04) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Emergency Changes (CHG-07) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security Impact Analysis for Changes
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to analyze proposed changes for potential security impacts, prior to the implementation of the change.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security Impact Analysis for Changes (CHG-03) provides risk identification and prioritization that compensates for the absence of Emergency Changes (CHG-07) by enabling informed decisions about where to focus resources to manage residual exposure. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
